mapper.select: SELECT s.s_name AS name, s.s_major AS major, s.s_year AS grade, #{semesterLabel} AS current_semester FROM student s WHERE s.s_id = #{studentId}

{ CALL GET_ENROLL_STATUS( #{status, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{startAt, mode=OUT, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{endAt, mode=OUT, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{daysLeft, mode=OUT, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{remainingSeconds, mode=OUT, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{deadline, mode=OUT, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} ) }

SELECT e.c_id AS course_id, l.subject AS course_name, COALESCE(p.p_name, l.prof) AS professor, ct.c_start AS start_time, ct.c_end AS end_time, c.c_where AS room FROM enroll e JOIN lecture l ON l.no = e.c_id JOIN class c ON c.c_id = e.c_id AND c.c_no = e.c_no LEFT JOIN professor p ON p.p_id = COALESCE(c.p_id, l.p_id) JOIN class_time ct ON ct.c_id = c.c_id AND ct.c_no = c.c_no WHERE e.s_id = #{studentId} AND e.e_year = #{year} AND e.e_semester = #{semester} AND e.e_status = 'ENROLLED' AND c.c_status != 'CANCELLED' AND ct.c_day = #{dayOfWeek} ORDER BY ct.c_start, l.subject
